scripts.emulators:start: npm run sync:firestore && npx -y firebase-tools@15 emulators:start --project aquaflow-management-suite --only functions,firestore,auth,storage
scripts.community:local: npm run sync:firestore && npm --prefix functions run build && npx -y firebase-tools@15 emulators:exec --project aquaflow-management-suite --only "functions,firestore,auth" "node seed-emulator.js && cd functions && npm run community:messenger:simulate"
scripts.test:bdd:local: npm run sync:firestore && npm --prefix functions run build && npx -y firebase-tools@15 emulators:exec --project aquaflow-management-suite --only "functions,firestore,auth,storage" "node seed-emulator.js && cd functions && npm run test:bdd"
scripts.test:all:local: npm --prefix functions run test && npm run test:bdd:local
